title: Cain
overview: Romi and George flee a devastated Earth to Eden17, only to find out that it is a dead planet.

title: Moopy
overview: Romi awakes 1,300 years later and is astonished to find a thriving city on Eden.

title: Astronaut
overview: Romi, Com, and a space pilot named Makimura land on a planet that closely resembles Earth.

title: Romi
overview: The trio finally reaches Earth only to find that space immigrants are barred from returning.
